children.heading: Coal waste utilization program
children.label: a Coal waste utilization program
children.text: The Secretary, in consultation with the Secretary of the Interior, shall establish a research, development, demonstration, and commercial application program on coal waste utilization for the purpose of developing techniques that will lead to the greater and more efficient utilization of coal wastes from mining and processing, other than coal ash.

children.heading: Use as boiler fuel
children.label: b Use as boiler fuel
children.text: The program referred to in subsection (a) shall include projects to facilitate the use of coal wastes from mining and processing as a boiler fuel for the purpose of generating steam to produce electricity.
